name_en: MINI BUMBAG Series M82335 Uninspected Version#
name_cn:
MINI BUMBAG Series M82335 Uninspected Version#
❒ Size: 17*12*9.5cm ❒
Best choice for this season's new arrivals in the MINI BUMBAG series
Showcases a soft interpretation of trendy waist bag design; the detachable chain adds functionality beyond decoration!
Stylish and retro, effortlessly creating a chic vibe, and the waist bag is no longer just a waist bag.
Versatile carrying options. Designers truly understand every woman; it is a dark horse in the waist bag world!
